What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include full tracebacks.

## Environment

- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- m1frame version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Backend: [e.g. claude / ollama / openai]
- Model: [e.g. claude-sonnet-4-20250514]
